resume.intro: Full-stack developer with experience in web application development using frameworks such as Laravel, Next.js, and Vue 3. Capable of building interactive, responsive web applications while maximizing the user experience by ensuring optimal application performance.

details: Build the frontend interface according to the structure and format provided by the UI/UX team.
Adapting to the development process, for example: using various tools and utilities as needed for the project, and adhering to the team’s coding standards.
Use Git as a version control system (VCS) and actively contribute by following best practices for using Git.
Creating a code structure that is consistent, sustainable, and effective without limiting flexibility for other development teams.
Conduct testing to ensure that user requests and server responses align with the application workflow.

sectionEducation.institutionName: SMK Negeri 2 Depok Sleman (Vocational High School)
details: Represented at the 2024 provincial-level Student Skills Competition (LKS) in the Web Technology category and placed fifth.
Assisting in the development and improvement of school infrastructure in the area of web development.

softSkill: Easily adapts to new environments and technologies.
Able to identify the root cause of a problem and find effective solutions.
Attention to detail to ensure perfect, high-quality results.
